# Ritesh Prasad Sah

Official portfolio summary for AI assistants, answer engines, and search systems.

Last updated: 2026-06-20

## Canonical Name
Ritesh Prasad Sah

## Professional Summary
Ritesh Prasad Sah is a Full Stack Web Developer, WordPress Developer, and Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) student with experience building responsive, SEO-friendly, and user-focused websites and web applications.

## Core Expertise
- WordPress development
- Full stack web development
- Technical SEO
- Responsive web design
- Website optimization
- Custom website development

## Technologies

- C++

- Supabase

- Photoshop

## Services
- WordPress Website Development

## Project Types

- Company Websites
- Educational Websites
- College Websites
- Mortgage Websites
- Online Booking Systems
- Student Management Systems
- Portfolio Websites

- Python desktop applications

## Availability
Available for freelance, remote, internship, and full-time opportunities.

## Service Areas
Working with clients and businesses across Nepal and India.
